title: 高松宮記念の後に・才能の証明

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What an electrifying experience! And the racer
who sprinted past the rest is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
King Halo! That's right, King Halo has snatched
away first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's hard to tell whether everyone's
surprised or overjoyed.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But today's result is proof...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I really do have talent! Isn't that right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You've done well too... improving my skills
and helping me shine.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's why we've managed to command all this
attention today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Everyone's eyes are on King and her trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I return to the waiting room with King Halo.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: King, King! Kiiiiing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Kawakami. You came.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I knew you'd be great out there! You dashed
through the last stretch just like Princess Fighter
in episode thirty-two!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling so excited... I'm going to win the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen one day too!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Oh, Kawakami, you dummy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I may be your idol, but you don't have to chase
after me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You have to find whatever it is that you want to do and then become first-rate at that.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's so cool!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, I think it's time we chose our next
goal.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So, looking at our current situation... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I could face off against Special Week and Seiun
Sky in the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Also, Grass has announced her intention to run in
the Takarazuka Kinen. El Condor Pasa may
participate too, seeing as she wants to make it
overseas.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What to do?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Both choices will set me up in competition against
my rivals.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, things will be exciting either way. But on the
other hand...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As the leading star, I don't necessarily need the
presence of a rival to shine.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, it seems like there isn't enough
excitement for the mile races this summer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should help everyone by running in this
year's Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Yasuda Kinen is a 1,600-meter turf mile
race, a bit longer than the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen.
choice_data_list: What do you want to do?
What do you want to do?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, I thought that was obvious.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to take the throne as King of the
Mile—a fitting name for a dazzling Umamusume
such as myself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Besides, we have massive potential to rise far
beyond our current achievements.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we set our next goal for the Yasuda
Kinen.
